note: Player characters are silent protagonists — Zach remains the only teaching voice. Avatars affect appearance only, never stats.

creation.step1: Choose from multiple male and female founder appearances
creation.step2: Compare every selectable founder in a visual card using the same 32-bit style used on the shop floor
creation.step3: Name your founder independently from the manufacturing company
creation.step4: Launch the company; avatar choice is cosmetic and never changes stats

playerVerbs.move: walk4dir pathing on the tile grid; walk distance costs ticks (layout matters)
playerVerbs.runEquipment: stand at a machine's operator tile -> setup/run; CNC machines require passing the G-code challenge first
playerVerbs.doTasks: carry stock between stations, deburr, inspect, preset tools
playerVerbs.planJobs: at the planning desk: open RFQ board, set routes, order material from NOX
